classes.reasoning: Document explicitly self-identifies as 'Investigator Brochure' in header, title, and footer. Contains comprehensive drug profile for BRC-209 (Velagostat) including physicochemical properties, preclinical pharmacology, human PK, and clinical safety data typical of an IB.

intervention: BRC-209 (Velagostat), oral tablet, 400 mg QD; Selective Tau Aggregation Inhibitor
summary: This is the initial Investigator Brochure for BRC-209 (Velagostat), a selective tau aggregation inhibitor being developed for Alzheimer's Disease. The document summarizes the drug's physicochemical properties, preclinical pharmacology, human pharmacokinetics from Phase II studies, and 52-week safety data from the BIORCE-NEU-2020-002 trial (n=94).
